description: Create an Artificial Double Tracking (ADT) vocal thickening effect in the Ardour session 'MyProject' using the vocal recording from /home/ga/Audio/vocal_sample.wav. The session must include a 'Lead Vocal' track starting at position 0, a 'Double Left' track panned 100% Left and shifted forward by 20 milliseconds (882 samples) at -6 dB, and a 'Double Right' track panned 100% Right and shifted forward by 35 milliseconds (1543 samples) at -6 dB. Save the completed session.
